creator: ml@tatsuya.info
text:
Directory composition was improved. 
Isn't it desirable that below /var uses a directory peculiar to ports?
 


---
# This is a shell archive. Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file". Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
# bounceHammer
# bounceHammer/Makefile
# bounceHammer/pkg-descr
# bounceHammer/distinfo
# bounceHammer/pkg-plist
#
echo c - bounceHammer
mkdir -p bounceHammer > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - bounceHammer/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >bounceHammer/Makefile << '6350e015fe214711f41db0abc958bf10'
X# New ports collection makefile for: bounceHammer
X# Date created: 12 Mar 2012
X# Whom: Tatsuya Ueda
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME= bounceHammer
XPORTVERSION= 2.7.7
XCATEGORIES= mail
XMASTER_SITES= http://dist.bouncehammer.jp/:master \
X ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE_JP}:sourceforge
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR= bouncehammer/53860
XDISTNAME= bouncehammer-2.7.7
X
XPATCH_SITES= http://dist.bouncehammer.jp/diff/2.7.7/
XPATCHFILES= 001_src-cgi-makefile.patch
X
XMAINTAINER= ml+freebsd@tatsuya.info
XCOMMENT= Bounce Mail Analyze System
X
XCONFIGURE_ARGS= --prefix=${PREFIX} \
X --exec-prefix=${PREFIX} \
X --datarootdir=${DATADIR} \
X --sysconfdir=${ETCDIR} \
X --docdir=${DOCSDIR} \
X --localstatedir=/var/${PORTNAME}
X
XOPTIONS= WEBUI "Enable Web User Interface" on
X
X.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
X
XHAS_CONFIGURE= yes
XUSE_PERL5= yes
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS:= p5-Class-Accessor-Fast-XS>=0.03:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor-Fast-XS \
X p5-Crypt-CBC>=2.30:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Crypt-CBC \
X p5-Crypt-DES>=1.00:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Crypt-DES \
X p5-Email-AddressParser>=0.04:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-AddressParser \
X p5-Error>=0.17015:${PORTSDIR}/lang/p5-Error \
X p5-Term-ProgressBar>=2.09:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Term-ProgressBar \
X p5-Path-Class>=0.17:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Path-Class \
X p5-Perl6-Slurp>=0.03:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Perl6-Slurp \
X p5-Text-ASCIITable>=0.18:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-Text-ASCIITable \
X p5-DBIx-Skinny>=0.0711:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBIx-Skinny \
X p5-YAML-Syck>=1.07:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-YAML-Syck \
X p5-Path-Class-File-Lockable>=0.02:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Path-Class-File-Lockable
X
X.if !defined(WITHOUT_WEBUI)
XBUILD_DEPENDS+= p5-CGI-Application>=4.21:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application \
X p5-CGI-Application-Dispatch>=2.16:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application-Dispatch \
X p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HTMLPrototype>=0.20:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HTMLPrototype \
X p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Session>=1.03:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Session \
X p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-TT>=1.04:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-TT
X.else
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-webui
X.endif
X
XRUN_DEPENDS:= ${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
6350e015fe214711f41db0abc958bf10
echo x - bounceHammer/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >bounceHammer/pkg-descr << '9997696778272f894504525023790e6f'
XbounceHammer is an open source software mainly developed for
X handling email bounces on UNIX/Linux server.
X
XWWW: http://www.bouncehammer.jp/
X
X- Tatsuya Ueda
Xml+freebsd@tatsuya.info
9997696778272f894504525023790e6f
echo x - bounceHammer/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >bounceHammer/distinfo << 'f360af7b6345a3996466f96abcb216ab'

XSIZE (001_src-cgi-makefile.patch) = 1837
f360af7b6345a3996466f96abcb216ab
